step.title: Load all planning artifacts
step.action: Read prd.md, architecture.md, epics.md, test-plan.md, traceability-matrix.md from docs/planning-artifacts/.

step.title: Verify artifact completeness
step.action: Check each artifact has all required sections as defined by its workflow checklist.

step.title: Verify traceability chain
step.action: Confirm the traceability chain is unbroken: brief to PRD to architecture to epic to test.

step.title: Check security mitigations
step.action: Verify all security mitigations from the threat model are documented and assigned.

step.title: Check test coverage goals
step.action: Verify test coverage goals from the test plan are achievable given the epic decomposition.

step.title: Report readiness
step.action: If all criteria met: report READY and recommend proceeding to Phase 4 (create-story).
If gaps found: report NOT READY with specific gaps and recommended actions.
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with readiness assessment.
